# Place animated GIF here

This directory should contain demo images/GIFs for the documentation.

## Expected file:
- `demo.gif` - Animated demonstration of Agile Board features

To add a demo GIF:
1. Record a 10-30 second demo showing main features (Kanban board, sprint planning, analytics)
2. Convert to optimized GIF format (target: 2-5 MB)
3. Save as `demo.gif` in this directory
4. The README.md will display: ![Demo](.github/images/demo.gif)

Tools for creating GIFs:
- ScreenFlow (macOS)
- Camtasia (cross-platform)
- ffmpeg (command-line)
- GIMP (advanced)
- Online converters: ezgif.com
